title: dalea lanata
intro: Dalea lanata, also known as White Prickly Poppy or Prairie Rose, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dalea lanata include its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing, as well as its ability to support respiratory health and alleviate digestive issues. Dalea lanata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
